mapper.select: -- memory_agg 테이블에서 최근 데이터 조회 SELECT ROUND(CAST(SUM(avg_buffer_usage_pct) AS NUMERIC), 2) as value, SUM(avg_buffers) as usedBuffers, -- 전체 버퍼 수는 최신 데이터에서 가져오기 (서브쿼리 수정) (SELECT buffers FROM memory_raw WHERE instance_id = #{instanceId} ORDER BY collected_at DESC LIMIT 1) as totalBuffers FROM memory_agg WHERE instance_id = #{instanceId} AND collected_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '5 minutes'

-- memory_agg 테이블에서 최근 Hit 비율 조회 SELECT ROUND(CAST(AVG(avg_hit_ratio) AS NUMERIC), 2) as value, SUM(total_heap_blks_hit) as hitCount, SUM(total_heap_blks_hit + total_heap_blks_read) as totalCount FROM memory_agg WHERE instance_id = #{instanceId} AND collected_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '5 minutes'

-- Shared Buffer 사용량 조회 SELECT ROUND(CAST(AVG(avg_buffer_usage_pct) AS NUMERIC), 2) as value, SUM(avg_buffers) as activeBuffers, (SELECT buffers FROM memory_raw WHERE instance_id = #{instanceId} ORDER BY collected_at DESC LIMIT 1) as totalBuffers FROM memory_agg WHERE instance_id = #{instanceId} AND collected_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '5 minutes'

-- 시간대별 eviction rate 계산 SELECT TO_CHAR(collected_at, 'HH24:MI') as time_label, total_eviction_count as eviction_count FROM memory_agg WHERE instance_id = #{instanceId} AND collected_at BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{endTime} ORDER BY collected_at

-- 시간대별 fsync rate -- bgwriter나 checkpoint 테이블에서 가져와야 함 SELECT TO_CHAR(b.collected_at, 'HH24:MI') as time_label, b.total_backend_fsync as fsync_count FROM bgwriter_agg b WHERE b.instance_id = #{instanceId} AND b.collected_at BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{endTime} ORDER BY b.collected_at

-- 시간대별 dirty buffer 추세 SELECT TO_CHAR(collected_at, 'HH24:MI') as time_label, ROUND(CAST(AVG(avg_dirty_ratio) AS NUMERIC), 2) as dirty_ratio FROM memory_agg WHERE instance_id = #{instanceId} AND collected_at BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{endTime} GROUP BY TO_CHAR(collected_at, 'HH24:MI'), collected_at ORDER BY collected_at

-- Eviction vs Fsync 비교 SELECT TO_CHAR(m.collected_at, 'HH24:MI') as time_label, m.total_eviction_count as evictions, b.total_backend_fsync as fsyncs FROM memory_agg m LEFT JOIN bgwriter_agg b ON m.instance_id = b.instance_id AND DATE_TRUNC('hour', m.collected_at) = DATE_TRUNC('hour', b.collected_at) WHERE m.instance_id = #{instanceId} AND m.collected_at BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{endTime} ORDER BY m.collected_at

-- 버퍼를 가장 많이 사용하는 상위 객체 SELECT relname as object_name, CASE relkind WHEN 'r' THEN 'table' WHEN 'i' THEN 'index' ELSE 'other' END as object_type, avg_buffers as buffer_count FROM memory_agg WHERE instance_id = #{instanceId} AND collected_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '5 minutes' ORDER BY avg_buffers DESC LIMIT #{limit}

-- 최근 요약 통계 SELECT ROUND(CAST(AVG(avg_dirty_ratio) AS NUMERIC), 2) as dirtyBufferRatio, -- Backend 대기 시간은 bgwriter나 session 테이블에서 가져와야 함 0.0 as backendWaitTime, -- Work Memory는 별도 수집 필요 0.0 as workMemUsage, -- Temp File Usage는 별도 수집 필요 0.0 as tempFileUsage, -- Checkpoint 간격은 checkpoint 테이블에서 가져와야 함 0.0 as checkpointInterval FROM memory_agg WHERE instance_id = #{instanceId} AND collected_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '5 minutes'

-- Memory 객체 리스트 SELECT memory_agg_id as id, relname as objectName, CASE relkind WHEN 'r' THEN 'table' WHEN 'i' THEN 'index' ELSE 'other' END as type, -- 크기는 pg_relation_size로 별도 계산 필요 0.0 as sizeMB, avg_buffers as bufferCount, ROUND(CAST(avg_buffer_usage_pct AS NUMERIC), 2) as usagePercent, -- Dirty count는 raw 테이블에서 가져와야 함 (SELECT dirty_buffers FROM memory_raw WHERE instance_id = #{instanceId} AND relname = memory_agg.relname ORDER BY collected_at DESC LIMIT 1) as dirtyCount, ROUND(CAST(avg_dirty_ratio AS NUMERIC), 2) as dirtyPercent, ROUND(CAST(avg_pinned_buffers AS NUMERIC), 0) as pinnedBuffers, ROUND(CAST(avg_hit_ratio AS NUMERIC), 2) as hitPercent, total_access_count as accessCount, total_eviction_count as evictionCount, ROUND(CAST(avg_access_time_ms AS NUMERIC), 2) as avgAccessTime, status FROM memory_agg WHERE instance_id = #{instanceId} AND collected_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '5 minutes'
AND relkind IN
'r'
'i'
AND status IN
#{status}
ORDER BY avg_buffers DESC
